package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for health_or_readiness_handlers_reach_into_business_repositories_directly: Health endpoints that depend on full business repositories instead of focused probes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule075NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule075NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule075NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario075Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule075NegativeService, input Rule075NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
